title: Basic Hand Sewing Kit, 70pcs Sewing Tools Set with Thread, Needles, Scissors for Home, DIY, Hobby, Travel, Beginners, Camping, Hiking
features: [Compact Design] Easy to carry for all your travel needs, convenient and efficient.
[ Container] No more worries about items falling out, stay organized with this sewing kit.
[Versatile Use] Suitable for home repairs, diy projects, hobby enthusiasts, beginners, emergencies, camping, hiking, and more.
[Complete Supply] Includes a variety of essential tools such as needles, threads, scissors, thimble, and more for basic repairs.
[Multicolor Set] Vibrant colors with materials, the sewing companion for all occasions.
description: Features: container, with this sewing kit, items won't fall out when you open the case. Compact design making it convenient to carry anywhere you travel. The kit can be used for home, DIY, hobby, beginners, emergency, camping, hiking, etc. This DIY sewing supply includes 18*Spools of Thread (random color), 1*Thimble, 10*Pearlescent Needle, 2*Threads, 1*Scissors, 1*Seam Ripper, 1*Buttons (3 in 1), 5*Safety Pins, 30*Golden Tail Needles(30 in 1), 1*Measuring Tape, 1*Storage Bag, contains all the necessary tools that are required for basic repairs. Specifications: Color: Multicolor Material: Cotton Thread, Stainless Steel,Cloth Qty: 70pcs/set Package Size: 140*130*25mm/5.51*5.12*0.98in Package weight: 101g/2.56oz Packing List: 18*Spools of Thread (random color) 1*Thimble 10*Pearlescent Needle 2*Threads 1*Scissors 1*Seam Ripper 1*Buttons (3 in 1) 5*Safety Pins 30*Golden Tail Needles(30 in 1) 1*Measuring Tape 1*Storage Bag
